variants: Kofi Boateng currently resides in Finchtrail Portal after being born in Clifftop Sanctuary. Having been born in Clifftop Sanctuary, Kofi Boateng attended Thistledew Academy, where he laid the foundation for his professional journey. Today, he is a valued employee at Grovefront Finance.
